# OpenSCAD WebAssembly

These files (`openscad.js`, `openscad.wasm.js`, `openscad.wasm`) are the official
OpenSCAD WebAssembly build, release **2022.03.20**, vendored from:
https://github.com/openscad/openscad-wasm/releases/tag/2022.03.20

OpenSCAD is licensed **GPL-2.0-or-later** (compatible with this project's GPLv3).
Source: https://github.com/openscad/openscad and https://github.com/openscad/openscad-wasm
Shipping these binaries to the browser is distribution; the corresponding source
is available at the URLs above.
